purpose: Operational case map. It selects work but does not supply clinical truth or approval.

selection_policy.duplicate_rule: A new case must add a distinct station contract, surprise, failure pattern, action threshold, or transfer target.

phases.label: Critical Emergency Dominance
phases.confidence_target: Keep the patient safe before the exact diagnosis is known

phases.label: High Complexity Pattern Mastery
phases.confidence_target: Handle overlap, uncertainty, and changing evidence

phases.label: Communication and Risk
phases.control_title: Communication, psychiatry, paediatrics, and women's health
phases.confidence_target: Communicate safely through emotion, risk, and conflict

phases.label: Examination Performance
phases.confidence_target: Perform, observe, interpret, teach, and present

patterns.title: Bad news shared decision and cultural safety
